chapter_title.en: Chapter on Oaths, Vows, and Expiations

text: رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ : "مَنْ أَجَلَّ اَللَّهَ أَنْ يَحْلِفَ بِهِ كَاذِباً أَعْطَاهُ اَللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ خَيْراً مِمَّا ذَهَبَ مِنْهُ ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4299 - The Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace be upon him and his family) said:
"Whoever reveres Allah (swt) and refrains from swearing a false oath by Him (swt), Allah (swt), the Almighty and Glorious, will grant him something better than what he has lost."
